productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue sweater made of 77% cotton,20% nylon and 3% spandex, has a ribbed mock collar, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, vertical ribbed design on the front, back and sleeves and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Winter is back! Step out and celebrate the winter chill in the warmth of this stylish sweater from United Colours Of Benetton. The unique rib knit design takes fashion to the next level and the soft blended fabric keeps you warm and comfortable. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes for that warm touch while you enjoy steaming hot street food in the cold. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
